programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Good Men

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Forgotten

programme.desc: A mayoral candidate is shot by an unidentified sniper and CPD races to catch the shooter before he can take out his next target.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: This City

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sacrifice

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confession

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fathers and Sons

programme.title: The Middle: Operation Infiltration

programme.title: Movie: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
programme.desc: Love blossoms between former childhood friends William Turner and Elizabeth Swann when Will teams up with an unorthodox pirate to save Elizabeth from a cursed band of bloodthirsty pirates.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After a First World War pilot crashes near a mythical island, he meets a race of warrior women who live there. Their princess leaves with him to help stop the war raging in the outside world, setting out on the path to becoming the legendary Wonder Woman.

programme.title: Movie: Justice League
programme.desc: In the wake of Superman's heroic death defending humanity, Batman and Wonder Woman bring together a team of superheroes that includes Aquaman, The Flash and Cyborg to defend the planet from an alien invasion led by the monstrous Steppenwolf.

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Movie: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: While visiting Russia, John McClane discovers his son, Jack, is a CIA operative. Together, John and Jack battle against a nuclear weapons heist in Russia.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: The team uncovers a mole in the ranks while working with the Department of Homeland Security to locate 900 missing pounds of explosives that pose an imminent threat to New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The NCIS team partners with several federal agencies to track a sniper who is targeting crowded events in the city.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Abyss
programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The team is given a 22-hour deadline after the murder investigation of a Chief Warrant Officer who specialized in counterintelligence reveals his wife had been kidnapped and is being held for ransom.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Stolen Valor
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a retired SEAL who tracked down individuals impersonating military personnel. But the case takes a mysterious turn when the lead suspect is found with the Navy issued jacket of an officer killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper

programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials, Part 1
programme.desc: Josh begins his search for extraterrestrial life with a once-in-a-lifetime visit to NASA. The journey continues on remote Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe extraterrestrials visited a millennia ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials, Part 2
programme.desc: The hunt for alien life continues in Zimbabwe, where Josh interviews witnesses from one of the largest UFO sightings in modern history. Josh's search for extraterrestrial life comes to the USA, where an investigation team brings him a case in Arkansas.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Lost Sky Heroes
programme.desc: Josh explores the case of lost WWII hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service pilots who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh hunts down new evidence in the disappearance of Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Origin of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Armed with a degree in archaeology and a passion for travel, Josh Gates investigates unsolved iconic stories across the globe. Immersing himself in different cultures to understand the world as they do, Josh hunts out the truth behind the legend.

programme.title: Big Time RV: 500 Horsepower Under $400K
programme.desc: Real estate moguls shop for an RV that meets their 500 horsepower high standards and suits their beloved puppy dog all for under $400K.

programme.title: Big Time RV: Million Dollar RV
programme.desc: A single father looks for a new camper to wow his daughter in time for her birthday.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake destroys an old church, a Delta 2 rocket explodes and showers Cape Canaveral with tons of flaming debris, a tornado that devastated buildings in Oklahoma and a Boeing 720 that is crashed via remote control by NASA.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Luck E Strike
programme.desc: Jimmy and Bobby Dennis fish for bass in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Seasons on the Fly Lodge 2019
programme.desc: We go to the Seasons on the Fly Lodge on Alaska's Kvichak River.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Green Turtle Cay, Bahamas - White Marlin Under The Birds!
programme.desc: George and Carl head offshore for billfish at the Green Turtle Club Resort and Marina.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: KW Stone Crabs
programme.desc: Ali fishes for the usual suspects while Rush catches something new in the shallows.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Key West Muttons and Sails
programme.desc: Steve Walker and Steve Rodger are in for a surprise when sailfish come to visit a productive mutton spot near Key West.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience: Up from the Deep
programme.desc: Captain Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are out for some deep dropping action in the deep waters, far from their home base of Middle Keys. We find out if they'll find something tasty or exotic.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Take A Soldier Fishing
programme.desc: Rick meets the meets the Florida Insider Fishing Report crew to take a soldier fishing.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Escapes
programme.desc: Many people think sipping frozen drinks on a tropical island is the ultimate escape. But these days, tree houses, themed cottages, dude ranches and even Alaska's frozen wilderness are the new way to get away.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Tiny Houses
programme.desc: Building a tiny home might seem easy, but as these six homeowners found out, downsizing can be a huge challenge. For those dedicated enough to let go of all their excess, living in a tiny home can have the biggest rewards.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Southern Exposure
programme.desc: The swamps and wetland creeks scattered across the south are homes to some of the most unique properties in the country. Meet six unforgettable homeowners who couldn't imagine living in their dream home without a backyard bayou.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Botfly Bite
programme.desc: An elite endurance athlete and a sensitive stay-at-home dad team up in a rugged Belize jungle where jaguars, venomous snakes, falling trees, and powerful storms threaten their evolving partnership.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: A Worm Delight
programme.desc: Puma Cabra and Julie Wright have to survive in Sabah, Borneo for 21 days. The jungle is their unrelenting foe as they battle with sickness, starvation, and the deadly wildlife.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Roasted Grubs
programme.desc: An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy green beret, take on disease-carrying sand flies, venomous snakes, and an infestation of caiman present huge challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Tiny Predators
programme.desc: The duo battle starvation, swarms of tiny predators, and accusations about a partner's survival abilities turn this partnership into a bad marriage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Bug Repellent
programme.desc: When sparks don't fly deep in the Panamanian jungle, an ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Y'All Are Trying to Please 11 Women

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eleganza Dahling

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Reverse the Gypsy Curse

programme.desc: Steel learns that Nate and Zoey have feelings for each other and tries to bring them together, despite the strict Grid Battleforce rules that forbid relationships between Rangers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Sorry to Father You/ Race to Sploosh Mountain
programme.desc: Ollie pulls a role model monster dad out of the pack to teach him how to shave for the first time. It's vacation day, so Ollie and friends pack up the car for a road trip to Sploosh Mountain.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: New Kid on Campus/ The Chosen One(s)
programme.desc: When Ollie takes Captain Wowski to school in the pack, Captain Wowskie poses as a new kid the next day. Then, a former Chosen One shows up, creating a rift between Ollie and his pals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Runaway Roadtrip
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick get lost on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, they end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.desc: NBA star Jimmy Butler battles the wings of death while talking about his shoot-offs with Michael Jordan and his BFF Mark Wahlberg.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Hairspray
programme.desc: A full-figured teen dreams of dancing on a popular dance show, but ends up in detention instead. The feisty young woman later teaches Baltimore a lesson in dance and integration.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Noodles and Quahogs
programme.desc: A Somerville, Mass. burger joint's mac and cheese burger; chorizo-stuffed quahogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken, Chili and Chowder
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for some scratch-made comfort food making stops at a family owned chilli restaurant and a three-story gourmet bad food joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup-Centric
programme.desc: Guy is filling up on some soup. In Baltimore, the authentic Irish pub is serving seafood gumbo and a twist on traditional corned beef and cabbage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seriously Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is topping off some great dishes with all kinds of sauce. In Cincinnati, a cafe puts its own spin on barbecue chicken and vegan chilli.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Pancake House Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is putting a new spin on classic neighborhood pancake house dishes, like mini Denver omelet frittatas with crispy hammy croutons and silver dollar tropical pancakes with mascarpone whipped cream.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family-style Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: In Giada's family, Sundays are set aside for family dinners. For a stress-free, traditional family dinner at home, her menu includes casual but hearty dishes like baby back ribs with spicy peach BBQ sauce and spaghetti with zucchini and squash.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Amy's in the House!
programme.desc: Valerie prepares inspiring Italian dishes like ribollita, porchetta cantaloupe and radicchio salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Celebrating Nan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are mourning the loss of Ladd's mother so she begins preparing lunch while the family works on tidying the ranch cemetery.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Grilling to Go
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's grilling up a well-deserved tailgate lunch. On the menu are smoky salt and pepper drumsticks, flame-grilled cheesy steakburgers, grilled taters with onions and garlic, spicy street corn and blueberry hand pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 2
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is home on the ranch and sharing great ideas for quarantine cooking. Her daughters Paige and Alex, nephew Stuart and her friends Mauricio step in as the crew shoot the show on their phones. Ree raids the pantry to make tomato soup 2.0.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm-Style Bowling
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are bringing some bowling party fun to the farm. Nick's building their own lane, and they're inviting friends over to play and enjoy.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: On The Road Again
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is traveling to Chicago to give a keynote address at a women's expo. To keep her energy up for this quick trip, she's preparing a breakfast parfait with fig compote, fruit and nut trail mix for the plane ride.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Family Reunion
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's family reunions are big, loud and legendary events. She's hosting the party at her Charleston, S.C., home and makes all the family favorites, including No-Fuss Baby Back Ribs with Carolina Moppin' Sauce and a beautiful 4-Bean Salad.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Healthy Fusion
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's chef friends visit his ranch to cook, and he challenges them to create healthy dishes instead of the epic, decadent meals they usually make.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: A Full Day of Delicious
programme.desc: The Kitchen is getting a full day of meals on the table with easy recipes for breakfast, lunch, dinner and even dessert. Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with his daughters as his sous chefs make huevos rancheros.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Deep Fried All-Stars
programme.desc: Deep fried dishes have been all over the map on DDD. You won't want to miss these fried beauties, from classics to off the wall righteousness.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Knockout Burger Joints
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up classic, real-deal burger joints. From California to New Jersey, Minnesota to Oklahoma, it's all about the all-American favorite.

programme.desc: After their father dies, Roseanne and Jackie cope with their loss in very different ways.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oh, WALD-E, Good Times Ahead
programme.desc: Alan confesses his true identity to Larry and has to face the consequences.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Ol' Mexican Spinach
programme.desc: Following a health scare on Halloween, Walden decides to reprioritize his life with Alan's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Shot a Little Girl
programme.desc: When Alan realizes Louis thinks he's cool, he starts breaking Walden's rules in order to keep it that way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sex With An Animated Ed Asner
programme.desc: Alan and Walden befriend three moms at a kids' gym but things get complicated when Walden becomes attracted to one of them. Meanwhile, Alan goes out for a girls' night with a group of moms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bouncy, Bouncy, Bouncy, Lyndsey
programme.desc: Walden discovers how challenging it is to be intimate with women with his foster son, Louis, in the house. Also, Herb asks Alan if he can go on a date with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!
programme.desc: Alan takes it upon himself to help Walden keep Louis after the social worker discovers he and Walden are not really a gay couple.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls
programme.desc: Walden joins a group for adoptive fathers and finds it to be a nice escape from Alan.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Beer-Battered Rip-Off
programme.desc: When Alan breaks up with their social worker to get back together with Lyndsey, Walden worries it will affect Louis' adoption.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Boompa Loved His Hookers
programme.desc: Walden fears if he breaks up with Ms. McMartin, it will jeopardize his adoption of Louis. Also, Alan hesitates when Lyndsey asks him to move in with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Give a Monkey a Gun
programme.desc: After they sign their divorce papers, Walden offers Alan the gift of his choice but when Alan chooses something selfish and impractical, it puts his relationship with Lyndsey on the line.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Of Course He's Dead
programme.desc: Walden and Alan discover that Charlie Harper might be alive or not.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Of Course He's Dead
programme.desc: Walden and Alan discover that Charlie Harper might be alive or not.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pilot
programme.desc: Commercial jingle writer Charlie Harper is surprised when his uptight brother, Alan, and Alan's 10-year-old son Jake ask to stay temporarily with him at his beach house. Charlie soon bonds with Jake, and the temporary arrangement becomes more permanent.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Flappy Bastards
programme.desc: Charlie gives Jake the cold shoulder after he lures seagulls into the house. Meanwhile, Alan gets a surprise from Judith when he offers to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Charlie takes Alan out on the town after Alan's fun-filled father/son weekend plans backfire. Too many drinks soon lead Charlie and Alan to confront their mother.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Annoyed that Ritchie finds his weekends with his dad more fun than his weekdays with her, Christine decides to make Richard responsible for having Ritchie complete his big homework assignment.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What About Barb?
programme.desc: When Barb starts working at Christine's gym, which she recently bought into, Christine can't accept the reality of not being in complete control. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him when he starts medical school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash
programme.desc: When Christine's environmentally friendly hybrid car and Marly's gas-guzzling monster SUV hit one another, it becomes a bigger dispute than simply who hit whom. While her car is in the shop, Christine has to rent an SUV when no other car is available.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Scores
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs up Ritchie for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that he's had trouble making friends. Christine claims not to believe in competitive sports but finds herself in competition with Richard for Mr. Harris' attention.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Endless Shrimp, Endless Night
programme.desc: Christine attempts to re-ignite the relationship between her brother Matthew and his ex-girlfriend. Meanwhile, Richard tries to get Ritchie interested in his job as a contractor.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Let Him Eat Cake
programme.desc: Christine resents that new Christine is reaping the benefits of all the time she spent trying to perfect Richard while they were married. Christine can't tolerate his thinking that new Christine gave him a thoughtful birthday gift when it was her idea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: Blanche's gay brother Clayton, makes a visit to Miami with a surprise, he has found the right person to make a commitment to, but Blanche still can't get over Clayton's sexual orientation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go
programme.desc: The girls find out that Rose's boyfriend is in a witness protection program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Cockfight Club
programme.desc: Dan heads to Chicago to give cockfighting roosters a second chance. Later, the crew worries if DJ the cow's unruly behavior will be welcomed by the rest of the herd.

programme.title: The Zoo: Covid19 & Animals
programme.desc: Get an update on Nadia, the Bronx Zoo's Malayan tiger who tested positive for COVID-19 from Chief Vet, Dr. Paul Calle. Also, hear from a World Health Organization scientist, wildlife experts and veterinarians on all things COVID-19 and animals.

programme.title: The Zoo: Meet the Babies
programme.desc: A look back at the cutest baby moments from the show. A tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby. A Thomson's gazelle needs a helping hand from zoo staff. A newborn snow leopard struggles to walk. A little blue penguin becomes a star.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: Movie: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: After she escapes from her abusive husband, a woman takes on a new identity and begins a new life. Just as she's starting to trust and love again, though, her husband tracks her down and the nightmare that she'd escape begins all over again.

programme.title: Movie: We Belong Together
programme.desc: An obessed woman goes to terrifying lengths to keep a man from re-uniting with his former wife.

programme.desc: A couple, desperate to have a baby, hires a surrogate mother. After taking her into their home, they discover she has a dangerous obsession with the husband. They are caught in her deadly game, and have to fight for their lives and their future.

programme.desc: Whitfield family comes together for their first holiday together in four years.

programme.desc: Will appears on a TV game show and picks his cousin to be his teammate over his friends.

programme.title: Property Brothers: The High Cost of Cool
programme.desc: Downtown dwellers give up their tiny urban condo to find a detached home with more space and the same modern aesthetic, but hope dwindles after missing out on four offers. When the walls come down, they discover a toxic disaster.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Home With a View
programme.desc: A couple looks for a forever home to share in a popular lakefront community outside of Nashville, and the choice comes down to two very different contenders.

programme.title: Property Brothers: The Homesick Cure
programme.desc: The brothers promise to make a fixer-upper feel like home for a couple who recently moved to a new city. Drew takes charge of the house hunt and a decisive move proves critical at the negotiating table.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Glitz and Glamour
programme.desc: A Minneapolis couple relocates to Las Vegas in search of a mid-century modern gem. One of the men has a drag queen ultra-ego. A famous drag queen offers design tips for the 'drag room.' Jonathan works his magic and brings the bling.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tear Downs and I Dos
programme.desc: With their wedding just months away, this couple hopes to find and renovate their forever home with room for their growing brood of rescue dogs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A Miami couple moved to Vegas 'temporarily' for work. Ten years, two kids and a bunch of rentals later, they have to admit it's permanent. Drew finds them a home that ticks all the boxes, while Jonathan juggles termite damage and last-minute changes.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Food and Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds Nora and Diego live with Diego's parents and grandmother in their single-level home in Richmond. The house has plenty of room, but the big foodies family feels cramped during weekday meals and large family gatherings.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Las Vegas Classic
programme.desc: A couple moves from the Las Vegas suburbs closer to the city into an older home they love with character. Johnathon and Drew help update their kitchen, office, mudroom and master bedroom to create the perfect home for the couple and their two sons.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Four Generations and Counting
programme.desc: A couple's two daughters are the fourth generation to live in their home, but the cramped layout isn't functional for their modern family. Jonathan and Drew transform the house while preserving its history to ensure it works for generations to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Friends
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan's long-time family friends Brian and Meghan bought a spacious Las Vegas home over 13 years ago. The awkward layout and dated builder-basic spaces are standing in their way of true enjoyment of their home.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Hide and Creep
programme.desc: For a mom of three, a trip to the casino is a chance to escape for some fun. But when her journey is cut short and she fails to return home, her family panics and launches a search for her and her vehicle that ultimately reveals a terrible truth.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Sam Giancana
programme.desc: Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Are Horseshoes Really Lucky?
programme.desc: Upcycling husband and wife team, Jeff and Ilana take on flipping friends Jeannine and Robin. The fun begins when each team gets $500 and only one hour to find pieces that need a little TLC at the Elephant's Trunk Flea Market in New Milford, Connecticut.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: You May Now Flip the Bride
programme.desc: Stylish lovebirds, Princess and Mark Anthony, compete against designing darlings, Simone and Christian.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Moose Is Loose!
programme.desc: Junkologists Scoop and Moose take on flea market-obsessed besties Sarah and Regina.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Team USA vs. Team Canada: Bring Your Eh Game
programme.desc: Canadian craftsmen, Austin and Moh are bringing their 'eh' game against style-savvy American couple Lauren and Scott.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Hooked on Flipping
programme.desc: Fashion bloggers Helene and Amy test their skills against experienced flippers Nicole and Luke.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Full-Contact Flipping
programme.desc: Kim, a professional female football player and her best friend Leslie share a love for flea markets. They'll take on designing dudes Ron and Peter.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Young Hipsters vs. Old School Design
programme.desc: Hip newlyweds Rachel and Blair take on besties Jyl and Michael.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Bilingual Beauties vs. Flip-Sters
programme.desc: Professional flip-sters, Jen and Kyle go head-to-head with bilingual beauties, Lindsay and Marizol (they might speak Spanish and Creole, but their first language is bargaining).

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Prohibition and Pop Stars

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flipping and Flirting

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Manila
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Manila's iconic foods, from slow roasted pork to chicken inasal.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Ball Gown Celebration Cake
programme.desc: In Lancashire, Molly Robbins has a very tall order: a celebration cake for a flamboyant customer to help him celebrate 35 years as a drag artist. The cake will be a life-size ball gown, complete with 50 edible peacock feathers and 3000 gold flowers.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Gothic Wedding Cake
programme.desc: A four-tier wedding cake pays tribute to a bride and groom's love of all things gothic.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Out of This World Upside Down Cakes
programme.desc: An upside-down wedding cake hanging from a chandelier is covered in sparkly rhinestones for the big day, plus an edible truck jumps over a Vegas ghost town. The planet Earth is made of cake, and one baker creates a realistic, 3D motorcycle cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Beer, Bling And Spinning Cakes
programme.desc: A brewery celebration calls for kegs made of cake that actually pour beer, and a huge, edible sombrero is filled with food and flames!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: Squidward gets annoyed when SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and play them non-stop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk
programme.desc: When the boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV, they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: It's Pony: Useful/ Stompy!

programme.title: The Closer: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When the star witness in a death-row inmate's appeal case is gunned down, Brenda and her team discover that there is more than one suspect with a motive. Meanwhile, Chief Pope's vengeful ex-wife airs Brenda's secrets in front of her team.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Resulting from the showdown in the murder room, Brenda finds herself taking some involuntary time off. When she is asked to help a friend solve a murder that is linked to a terrorist group, Brenda works to find the killer and still keep it under wraps.

programme.title: The First 48: Update Special: Devil Inside/Flight Risk
programme.desc: After a woman's dismembered body is found beneath an overpass in Tucson, Arizona, the suspect reveals a disturbing dark side--and shocks investigators with a revelation no one saw coming.

programme.title: The First 48: Update Special: Dumped
programme.desc: In Memphis, Tennessee a man's body is found dumped in a field. Despite every effort, the case goes cold and the murderer remains a mystery.

programme.title: The First 48: After the First 48: Into the Night
programme.desc: An attempted mugging turned to murder when a man stopping at a gas station for a lottery ticket and beer was shot and killed.

programme.title: The First 48: Caught in the Middle
programme.desc: Two Miami men are found beaten and shot to death behind an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Encounter/ Car Trouble
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives work the murder of a hard working janitor, brutally stabbed to death in his own apartment. In Birmingham, detectives investigate the murder of a man walking home after fixing a friend's car.

programme.title: The First 48: Massacre in Little Haiti/ Exposed
programme.desc: A massacre outside a corner store leaves two dead and two clinging to life in Miami. In Cleveland, a man is found strangled in his apartment.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Predator or Prey?
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Africanized Bees
programme.desc: Disguised as paradise, the harsh environment is teeming with killer bees and other aggressive and disease-carrying insects, one of which may prove to become the team's biggest threat.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Ring of Fire Pt. 1
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes wolves circle a successful fan survivalist attempting a 21-day challenge in the frigid mountains of Bulgaria. Their only defense against the prowling predators may be lighting large fires.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Ring of Fire Pt. 2
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes a survivalist lights large fires as a defense against predatory wolves and hypothermia. The flames may grow out of control and become the biggest threat of all.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: 21 Miles, 21 Days
programme.desc: In a lethal African hunting ground, a biker chick and a taxidermist have to stay on the move to survive. The pair must push across 21 miles of savannah to find food and water while avoiding a pride of lions that's tracking them every step of the way.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Himalayan Hell
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the high altitude and extreme cold of the Himalayan foothills in northern India. In the face of severe dehydration, one survivalist's debilitating illness threatens to derail both their chances of success.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lord of the Rats
programme.desc: A workaholic mom and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, it's a daily struggle not only to survive, but to understand each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: 21 Miles, 21 Days
programme.desc: In a lethal African hunting ground, a biker chick and a taxidermist have to stay on the move to survive. The pair must push across 21 miles of savannah to find food and water while avoiding a pride of lions that's tracking them every step of the way.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Queen
programme.desc: In the snake-filled Mississippi swamps, Gabrielle, a former fan survivalist takes on the full 21-day challenge. Gabrielle and Brian are faced with deadly snakes, unrelenting mosquitos, nocturnal predators and a relentless week-long thunderstorm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Botswana Breakdown
programme.desc: A Seattle banker and a Rhode Island bartender head to Africa to test their survival skills in the barren plains of Botswana.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K
programme.desc: The 405 are in Bristol, Tennessee to compete in the biggest no prep event in Street Outlaws history. With 32 of the baddest cars around competing for $100,000, the OKC racers give it everything they've got in order to take the win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Crowning the King
programme.desc: After a dramatic round one, the race to the No Prep Kings Points Championship is wide open. With everything on the line, the top racers are prepared to give everything they've got in order to earn the coveted title of No Prep King Points Champion.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Elite Powersports and Abel Racing
programme.desc: The owners of a Louisiana ATV shop reject Richard's offer. Richard then goes to Oklahoma where he considers rehabbing a local tuning shop that's barely paying the bills. After putting the owner to a test on the dyno, Richard helps him out.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Abel Racing
programme.desc: Richard and crew struggle to turn around a huge 8,000 sqft speed shop in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. This is the largest garage they've done and almost an impossible feat to accomplish, but with a genius tuner as the co-owner, it's a job they want to take.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Slop Shop
programme.desc: Richard helps an up-and-coming motorcycle shop in Jackson, Mississippi overhaul their shop and plan to become the go-to garage for custom old-school bikes.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Fast Lane Auto Repair
programme.desc: Richard uses his time, money, and resources to help a fellow hot rod enthusiast in Nashville, Tennessee. With less than a week to transform the shop and financially troubled owner, Richard and his crew have their work cut out for them in Music City.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Zurba Industries
programme.desc: Richard and the team help a struggling custom hot rod shop in Huntington Beach, CA.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Vintage Payday
programme.desc: Richard races toward a vintage payday by restoring his '37 Buick Racer back to its Indy 500 roots. Meanwhile, the guys buy a one-owner '77 Blazer that could fetch them double their money. Later, a surprise birthday gift has Richard feeling nostalgic.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The Monkeys race to finish their Buick Indy Racer for a deep-pocket client. Next, a collector wheels and deals for Richard's 1975 Datsun 280-Z and Brian Bass reveals upcoming changes at Gas Monkey Garage.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Hot Wheels, Big Deals
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings, Aaron Kaufman and the Gas Monkeys are living a dream when they build a life-size Hot Wheels car. What better car to build than one from the original 'Sweet Sixteen' set that started the entire Hot Wheels movement in 1968?

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Spinning Their 'Hot' Wheels
programme.desc: Hot Wheels challenges Richard and Aaron once again to build a life-sized car to possibly become part of their exclusive Red Line Club and Aaron reveals his choice for the build: a 1963 Ford Econoline truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cruisin' For A Bruisin'
programme.desc: As the Monkeys race to finish their first big build without Aaron, Richard tries to unload his '65 Shelby Mustang GT with a frozen engine.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Family Ties
programme.desc: Michael introduces Angela to his mother. Darcey and Jesse are still tense as they head to Connecticut. Rachel meets Jon's skeptical sister. Paul and Karine clash. Tarik has a religious experience with Hazel's folks. Ricky might get rejected in Colombia.

programme.desc: Paul and Karine face pre-marital problems. Jon's sketchy past concerns Rachel. Ricky weighs his options. Hazel's motives are questioned by Tarik's brother. Angela is annoyed with Michael. Tensions grow between Darcey and Jesse.

programme.title: Families of the Mafia: Part I

programme.title: Families of the Mafia: Part II
programme.desc: Karina makes amends with her dad, which causes Dennie to reflect on her relationship with her own biological father. Karen and Ramona begin to butt heads at the restaurant. While Jess is out of town, Joe begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Families of the Mafia: Part III
programme.desc: Karen and the crew celebrate the grand opening of her restaurant, which includes an unexpected guest. Billy continues to make amends with Taylor and Joe. CP disappoints his family when he doesn't show up for his sister's birthday.

programme.title: Families of the Mafia: Part IV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wycleff Jean

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate Oktoberfest in 'lederhosed', welcome unexpected guests in 'don't answer', and experience some sweet and stern 'southern mother'n'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nick Young
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined on the couch by NBA sharpshooter Nick Young to meet some kids 'doing it like dad', get to know some 'friendly foes', and see who's getting 'uncertified buckets'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXIII
