programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo find some people who take ghosting to another level, discuss the best time to just take the 'L,' and watch some people get burned.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Rob Riggle joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they visit a "Ski Disaster Academy," celebrate some "North American Turds," and report the news while "Live on the Scene."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling and Chanel VI
programme.desc: The guys are in the studio 'freaking out' over the new epidemic 'heavy leg syndrome' and they discover the fine art of 'extreme sitting.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dana White
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and UFC Founder Dana White show the meaning behind 'banned-kinis.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 100th
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel celebrate the 100th episode of Ridiculousness by getting 'popcorned,' trying not to catch 'heavy leg syndrome,' and having some good old-fashioned 'redneck good times.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wanda Sykes
programme.desc: Comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have 'Unpresidential Nipples,' doling out 'Momforcement,' and the first ever 'Wandamania.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo II
programme.desc: Rob breaks down Skiers vs. Snowboarders. Shoes go flying off in Shoe Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jason Ellis
programme.desc: Australian-born actor and radio personality Jason Ellis shows us he is an expert at Showing Off Gone Wrong when the introduction of Tramp Stamp videos earns him a surprise payback from Chanel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to Lake Painatonka, catch the quick hands in Grabbies and watch some unsuspecting people get Effed from behind.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dude Perfect
programme.desc: Trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to enjoy some 'Dudebrations,' witness the pain of 'DudPerfect' and learn about the dangers of 'Bad Garretts.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Grossest Episode Ever
programme.desc: Things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ass masters, avoid boogie knights, and discover the disgusting side of mother birding.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dan Heaton
programme.desc: Witness a merry-go-round of pain; guest unicyclist Dan Heaton shows off some Uni-Psychos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Ridickys
programme.desc: It's awards show time on 'Ridiculousness,' and Rob, Steelo and Chanel can't wait to give out Ridicky Awards to worthy winners from throughout the series. Some of the award categories include The Biggest Dick, The Freedom Falcon and The Grand Slam.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob's Parents II
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome Rob's parents, Pat and Gene Dyrdek.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel take a ride in some self-crashing cars, light a match to some Fuel Fools and mock some criminals with no getaway plan.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson
programme.desc: Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson shows his wolf battle cry and what sets off his hot button.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Family Style

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Levitating Lighthouse

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Tia and M2 take to the water to prepare a pit bull for her forever home. A new parolee comes to Villalobos from Boston, hoping stay on track so that he can make his teenage son proud. A stray dog is near death when Lizzy and Heidi find him.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Mild Winter
programme.desc: The Kilchers face fallout from the warmest Alaskan winter in decades. Atz Sr., Otto, Atz Lee and Eivin tackle an emergency mission to supply and secure their hunting cabins. Charlotte and Jane search for a missing newborn calf.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Your Family
programme.desc: Brown becomes tired of the chaos and arranges a surprise 'Family Day' to occupy them all only to create more family drama.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Your Maker
programme.desc: Ms. Edna becomes depressed and loses the desire to live when she learns a childhood friend dies alone and broke. Cora is concerned and initiates a 'This is Your Life' night to show Edna how appreciated she is.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Babies

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: The Top Finds and Moments You Never Saw
programme.desc: We look back on seven seasons of the show and countdown the 10 most incredible finds of the series. Each episodes leaves hours of footage on the cutting room floor, so we'll look back on some previously unseen moments.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down: The Pirates of Oak Island
programme.desc: Ever since the discovery of the Money Pit, Oak Island has been closely linked to colorful tales of pirates. This edition drills down on the myths, legends and compelling evidence that pirates were behind the world’s longest treasure hunt.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bloodsport
programme.desc: An entire college football team comes under investigation when their beloved coach is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: All Is Bright
programme.desc: The team investigates a ransomware attack that takes out the entire power grid for west L.A. and paralyzes the city. Also, as the first holiday season since the death of Sam's wife approaches, he struggles to find the best way for his family to celebrate.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After napalm is detected at a crime scene, the team investigates the sole causality for possible links to terrorism.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Cac Tu Nhan
programme.desc: While Hetty is being tortured by her captors in Vietnam, Eric and Nell find a clue to her whereabouts, prompting the team to organize a rescue mission with very little information.

programme.title: NCIS: What Lies Above

programme.title: NCIS: M.I.A.
programme.desc: To carry out a sailor's dying wish, Gibbs and the team reopen a murder case that was originally ruled an accidental death. Also, the case reminds Torres of a tragic time from his past.

programme.title: NCIS: The Wall
programme.desc: When a marine is murdered at an event for the Honour Flight Network, the team must rely on an irritable Vietnam War veteran to provide details on the victim's whereabouts. Also, McGee and Bishop investigate a juicy rumour about Quinn and Torres.

programme.title: NCIS: A Bowl of Cherries
programme.desc: After a vice admiral's laptop is infected with ransomware, he enlists McGee and the team to track down the hacker before the computer virus eliminates his files. Also, Alex takes time off to assist her mother after she receives a 911 text.

programme.title: NCIS: One Book, Two Covers
programme.desc: Torres must rely on old case notes and contacts after a Marine's murder is linked to a former dirt bike gang he joined for a year-long undercover operation.

programme.title: NCIS: Beastmaster

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Ghost Ship Terror
programme.desc: Ghost ship sightings are frequent in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge underwater technology and witness testimony, a team of experts turn up new evidence to explain why sailors and crewmen vanish from their boats without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Nightmares of Neutron Stars
programme.desc: Neutron stars are strange and violent phenomena which defy the laws of physics, and new discoveries show that these bizarre nightmares are potentially far deadlier than we ever thought, with the power to destroy planets and even other stars.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey from the Center of the Sun
programme.desc: Discover how light escapes from the sun, from its fiery birth through its 430,000 mile battle against gravity and magnetism to its escape from the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Sorrow

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: Two girls take a trip to the mall and never come home. Less than 24 hours later they are found shot to death in a desolate field. An investigation aims to resolve if they were killed by someone they knew or had been victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: After Michael Brinkman is murdered in his home, police are left to untangle the mystery of why the two masked home invaders stole nothing and left a series of strange clues at the crime scene.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rocky Mountain Mystery
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears on a cold night in Breckenridge Colorado, one of the state's darkest mysteries begins.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Their Own
programme.desc: When the daughter of an FBI agent disappears from an airport parking lot, law enforcement from all over the country rallies to find one of their own. But the case quickly becomes one of the bureau's most difficult and heartbreaking investigations.

programme.title: American Monster: Home Video Hit
programme.desc: A typical American family isn't exactly what it seems. In public, Max and Janeene Jones appear to have the perfect marriage, but behind this happy image lies hidden truths. 20 years later, an undercover police investigation reveals an unexpected killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Right Before Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a good-looking, successful businessman meets an aspiring actress, she appears to be the perfect match. But the honeymoon doesn't last long. The relationship takes a turn...a deadly turn.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Key to Murder
programme.desc: Melinda Snyder's death stunned Rock Hill, SC, where even her closest friends came into question. The former homecoming queen's murder embroiled the quiet town in a mystery that wouldn't be settled until the South Carolina Supreme Court weighed in.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Nightmare over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Before single mom Lori Leonard settles into her upstate New York home, she vanishes without a trace and detectives don't know if she's dead or alive. Only when a couple of Average Joes make an extraordinary catch do they reel in the shark who did Lori in.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: A Strange Trust
programme.desc: When 16-year-old BFFs Dawn Donaldson and Crissy Campbell vanish overnight, the residents of Grass Valley, California, fear for their children's safety. Rumors fly, from runaways to abduction. Detectives must find them before their worst fears come true.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Everyone Has a Motive
programme.desc: When John Kowalczyk is shot dead, rumors fly in the quiet town of Vienna, VA. Friends can't imagine who would murder the successful entrepreneur. But as police look into John's inner circle, a web of suspects emerges that has the whole town on edge.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Bloodshed in Biloxi
programme.desc: Panic spreads through a Mississippi town when Lynette Jarrett disappears. With no body and little evidence, no one can solve this mystery. Only when a secret is revealed do detectives unravel a tale of deadly obsession that leads them to one greedy guy.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Death in Daytona
programme.desc: Spring break ends in heartbreak when coed Chrissy Lazzaro is gunned down miles from her Daytona Beach hotel. A few hot tips soon peter out and the case goes cold, but a startling change of heart finally brings a heartless killer to justice.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Trouble in Coal Country
programme.desc: When 13-year old paperboy David Reed never returns home his hometown is devastated. How could one of their most familiar faces vanish into thin air? Two decades later, the case remains a mystery… until police get an unexpected blast from the past...

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lookin' for Souls to Steal
programme.desc: When two college students are gunned down while parked in a quiet lovers' lane in Juliette, Georgia, the tiny community is beside itself with panic.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mr. & Mrs. Fantastic
programme.desc: When elderly couple Charles and Grace Lewis vanish from the family farm along with their pickup truck, their children realize that something is terribly wrong. As word spreads, fear envelopes the quiet religious community of Bonne Terre, MO.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: End of an Era
programme.desc: When a beloved local business owner is murdered while minding his store in idyllic Cumberland Gap, TN, no one wants to think that the killer could be one of their own. Could the killer have been a stranger or someone a little closer to home?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Seeing Orange
programme.desc: Chris and JJ battle with besties Jessica and Melissa.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: No Cement in This Man Cave!
programme.desc: Brothers-in-law Marc and Henry go up against sisters Amanda and Whitney.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Sparks Are Flying
programme.desc: Experienced pickers Heshy and Michael go toe-to-toe with fashionable friends Holly and Carlyle, as each team gets $500 to find, fix, and flip pieces they'll buy at the Brimfield Antique Show in Brimfield, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Mus-Stache for Cash
programme.desc: Experienced flippers, Brenda and Mark are ready to take on designing sweethearts, Lauren and Ben.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Balloon of Doom
programme.desc: Best friends April and Jenn battle against married couple Mark and Veronica.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Ready for Take-Off
programme.desc: Eclectic artists Chandi and Kim spar with former Wall Streeters Katie and Pels.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Flea Market Flip puts two teams to the test, challenging them to find diamonds in the rough to rescue, recycle, and re-invent into decorating gems and resold for a profit.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Battle of the Green Chaise
programme.desc: Each team given 500-dollar budget to find, fix up, and flip items purchased at New York's Stormville Airport Flea Market. In one hour.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Battle of the Roomies
programme.desc: Great friends Travis and Sydney take on the spunky duo of Gina and Lindsey.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Urban Upcyclers vs. Creative Best Friends
programme.desc: Competitors refurbish chairs and convert a bike into a bar.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Travel to Las Vegas to uncover why this city is all about extremes, 100th episode.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Miami
programme.desc: Blend of old-world immigrants and new-wave trendsetters bring a mix of flavour to Miami.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Craving Comfort
programme.desc: From bacon-wrapped meatloaf and a double-decker pizza burger to boozy French toast and smothered biscuit sandwiches, these restaurants across the country offer up a warm, comforting hug of flavour.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Food Hall of Fame
programme.desc: New dining experiences and classic comforts are brought together under one roof at these food halls, from spicy fried chicken paired with decadent mac and cheese at Atlanta's Krog Street Market to a pierogi melt at Cleveland's West Side Market.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Spicy L.A.
programme.desc: Tia and her husband hit the streets of LA for a spicy adventure. Tia makes two sets of tacos, vegetarian roasted butternut squash tacos with avocado hummus and blackened fish tacos with avocado slaw.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Game On
programme.desc: Tia invites her friends over for some alfresco finger foods! On the menu: Teriyaki Grilled Steak Skewers with Chili Herb Dipping Sauce, BLT Salad Bites, Hot Potato Tots with Chipotle Ketchup, and Tomato Pop Micheladas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Dine and Dish
programme.desc: Cory offers to watch Cree for the night so Tia and her friend, Kelly Rowland, can enjoy a girls' night in. Kelly lends Tia a hand to prepare chicken katsu with spicy apple slaw; cauliflower fried rice, sesame noodles with veggies and spiked green tea.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Tia Mowry is bringing breakfast to the dinner table. Tia cranks up the flavor with some gourmet spices when she prepares Shakshuka, Bacon Avocado Toast Bar, Herbed Potato Galette.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Booze and Bites
programme.desc: Tia Mowry is bringing over Naya Rivera, Rich Paul, Gabrielle Dennis and Alphonso McAuley to munch and mingle. After picking up some cook party pieces from her friend Cassandra, she's setting up a classic cocktail bar for the party.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Besties Brunch
programme.desc: Tia Mowry treats two of her best friends, Jessica Laskey and Traci Blackwell, to a delicious brunch. Over sips of Blackberry Brambles and great conversation, the girls enjoy Tia's Crab Cakes with Spicy Remoulade, Zucchini Ribbon Salad with Pesto.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A Basket of Brunch Goodies
programme.desc: Bobby makes continental favourites such as banana bread with vanilla bean-pecan butter.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southwest Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay channels his love of Southwestern cuisine for this brunch that packs a flavourful punch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Beach-y Keen Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby uses the brightest and boldest flavors in his Jerk Pork Belly & Sweet Potato Hash with Fried Eggs and makes Coconut Waffles with Chocolate Maple Syrup & Bananas.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wine Country
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay's brunch vibe is all about the wine for this wine country themed menu.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Good Eats: Herbal Preservation
programme.desc: Alton shows us how to use and care for fresh herbs.

programme.title: Good Eats: Spice Capades
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives a lesson in spices.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Cheer Up Star/ Quest Buy
programme.desc: When Star is having a bad day, Marco comes up with a plan to cheer her up. Later, they venture to Quest Bay to purchase a new wand charger before Star's wand dies.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star on Wheels/ Fetch
programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star vs. Echo Creek/ Wand to Wand
programme.desc: Star goes into hiding after accidentally destroying a car. Later, Star and Ludo struggle to learn how to use their new wands properly.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Arm/ The Other Exchange Student
programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Bon Bon the Birthday Clown
programme.desc: Star has second thoughts about attending a dead clown's séance, when Jackie asks Marco to go to the school dance with him.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: St. Olga's Reform School for Wayward Princesses
programme.desc: To give Pony Head a good birthday, Star must face her greatest fear - going to St. Olga’s Reform School for Wayward Princesses, to bust her out. Once there, Star and Marco find the school is even worse than they thought and their plan won't be easy.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: When Marco is captured by Toffee and held for wand-ransom, Star enters into an unlikely alliance with Ludo and Buff Frog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life

programme.desc: With the HOA shutdown still keeping Jed Smith at a standstill, Willa and Benny renovate their offices. Scott looks for ways to make up for lost time and brings in outside help without telling Benny or Miki.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: More Money, More Problems

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Thank You
programme.desc: Scott contemplates his next move as the Jed Smith project has become more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Scott and Ilan continue to disagree about what to do with the grotto at the Mark Wahlberg flip project.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: The Race to Finish

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Loaded for Bear

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Tractor-Failure

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain
programme.desc: A team of Americans attempts to solve one of the great mysteries of World War II. With the help of an eyewitness, they explore a mountain in the Philippines where Japanese general Yamashita is believed to have buried a vast treasure during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Excavation is put on hold when the team unearths a possible water trap. The team conducts a LiDAR scan to find another way into the mountain.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Dead Giveaway
programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The team triggers a possible water trap in the cave and is forced to stop digging. Martin believes the story rock indicates a tunnel behind a waterfall and the team brings in a Navy diver to explore the plunge pools and search for an entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: The Backdoor
programme.desc: Unable to find a tunnel at the waterfall, the team is guided by an animal marker to a boulder carved in the shape of a turtle. Following the direction of the turtle head, the team discovers a golden lily symbol indicating a secret backdoor entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete
programme.desc: The team believes there's a secret backdoor entrance to the mountain behind a unique formation of rocks. After battling a typhoon and possible Nazi concrete, they find a void 40-foot below.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Blood and Conspiracy

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: The Turning Point

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Exciting finds bring new excitement, but the team must move quickly since time is running out before they must suspend operations for the harsh winter ahead.

programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.desc: When Bart is forced to chaperone Jimbo's girlfriend at a movie, she ends up developing feelings for him, resulting in a whole bunch of trouble with the bullies at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Totally Fun Thing Bart Will Never Do Again
programme.desc: When Bart sees a commercial for the ultimate cruise, he begs his parents for a family vacation. Low on cash, the only way they can go is if each family member sells one valuable item.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga
programme.desc: Lisa tries to reverse her status as one of the least popular girls in school by ghostwriting positive things about herself on the school blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moonshine River
programme.desc: The family travels to New York City in search of Bart's long-lost love who he wants to reconnect with. Lisa and Marge look forward to the trip and settle for the free 'Shakespeare In the Park,' which doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Adventures in Baby Getting
programme.desc: When Marge's car falls into a sink hole, she buys the perfect replacement. However, she grows to hate it since, as she tells a shocked Homer, it would be too small if she wanted to have another baby.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Abie Gone
programme.desc: When Grampa escapes from his retirement home, Homer and Marge frantically try to track him down by following clues that reveal secrets in Grampa's past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys
programme.desc: Homer is shocked to discover that his bowling teammate is an accountant for Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Goes to the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Dee and Dennis take the gang to their favourite childhood vacation spot where things aren't quite how they remember.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank Reynolds' Little Beauties
programme.desc: Frank accidentally gets into the child pageantry business and is terrified of coming across as a 'Diddler.'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Sweet Dee Gets Audited
programme.desc: Desperate times call for sad and horrific times as Sweet Dee tries to get out of an IRS audit. The rest of The Gang institute a new democratic voting system.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank's Brother
programme.desc: The Gang is shocked to meet Frank's long lost brother, Gino, when he unexpectedly arrives at Paddy's Pub and exposes a wealth of family secrets.

programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his family are very much a part of their community. In honor of his dedication, Dr. Pol is surprised with an award in recognition of his work with 4H Club.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Talk Turkey to Me

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest
programme.desc: The universe is a dangerous place, and we explore the deadliest spots in the cosmos. Between earth and the edge of the universe, there are a million ways to die, and our crash test dummy is on a mission to reveal the worst.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Say it Ain't So
programme.desc: The Long Branch Saloon is the local hangout for most everyone in the small town of Poteau, Oklahoma. That is until its beloved proprietor goes missing, leaving behind a splatter of blood and many unanswered questions.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Truth or Death
programme.desc: In rural Georgia, single dad, Donald Ray Skinner, meets a beautiful Mississippi blond, Allene Hawkins. She's also a single mom and sparks soon fly. They marry, but it won't be happily ever after. Behind their blissful façade stirs lethal deceit.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Wrestling with the Devil
programme.desc: In Yakima, Washington, high school athletic director Gabby Moore turns out winning teams and championship athletes. But when two of Gabby's protégés are unexpectedly drawn into his personal life a deadly game of love, loyalty, lust and betrayal arises.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder by Proxy
programme.desc: Marcia's relationship with Texas trucker James endures resentment from Marcia's teenage daughter Shaina. But true devotion knows no bounds. Things are looking up until greed and deceit set off a chain reaction that leads to six arrests, and one dead body.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Kraig and Karen Kahler enjoyed a life of influence and privilege, but sexual obsession spun out of control and destroyed everything.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Killing Time
programme.desc: Karla and Ray Porter are the envy of their neighbors. But after more than 20 years of marriage, Karla's loyalties are no longer with Ray. When he unearths her betrayal, his own dark side is revealed, and a bizarre chain of events is set into motion.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurses Lara Crockett and Ricardo Muscolino meet on the night shift. He's ambitious and sets about creating a rich life for them and she's happy to go along.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Living with the Devil
programme.desc: When Darren and Elizabeth marry eight weeks after meeting, no one thinks it's a good idea. The couple just doesn't care, until one of them turns up dead.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.desc: Contractors Jake and Joel Moss go vertical with white stucco walls and a water feature made from reclaimed fence boards and a rusty old milk jug. Plus a flagstone patio and a traditional Greek oven, creating a Mediterranean seaside village vibe.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)
programme.desc: When his trip to Thailand is cancelled at the last minute, Alton sets out to find the next best thing a proper Pad Thai.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic roast chicken episode with new flavours, new science and a strange new twist on 'broiling'.

programme.desc: Jack performs the song 'Gold Digger' at a school talent show and when he sings a lyric that includes THE word, it leads to his possible expulsion from school.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Chris De'Sean Lee
