programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Elizabeth Gilies
programme.desc: Today's guest comedian is Charles Esten, with a guest star appearance by Elizabeth Gillies of 'Dynasty'.

programme.title: Roswell, New Mexico: Como La Flor
programme.desc: Liz revisits a painful part of her past when her mother Helena arrives unexpectedly. Michael urges Maria to seek help after she has a strange vision. Kyle's attempt to get Steph to open up doesn't go as planned. Helena's arrival sends Rosa spiraling.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Tells...
programme.desc: Rachel confronts the father of her baby; Monica and Chandler go on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stall
programme.desc: Elaine agonizes over a woman's refusal to pass her some toilet paper in the restroom.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Three Girls and An Urn
programme.desc: Molly meets the best buddy of her dreams when Peggy's childhood friend comes to town, but Peggy is not keen on sharing.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: David Copperfield Slipped Me a Roofie
programme.desc: Convinced that Alan's family doesn't fully appreciate him, Melissa invites him to live with her and her mom.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Lame Gretzky
programme.desc: Even though he is terrible, Adam tries his best at ice hockey and hopes to impress Murray. Likewise, Murray works hard to show he enjoys watching Adam make home movies. Meanwhile, Beverly drives Erica crazy about her S.A.T.'s.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Dinner With the Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica warns Geoff about going to dinner with her family to celebrate her birthday, but he insists. Upon arrival, it's apparent this will be no ordinary dinner out.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Wedding Cake Cake Cake
programme.desc: Max and Caroline agree to make a wedding cake for a bride who can't decide on what style she wants or much of anything else.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Blue Canvases
programme.desc: Blue helps Keira prepare for an audition, resulting in an intimate first moment for the couple. Meanwhile, after Tasha tells Rick her intentions to break things off with Pookie, she is caught off guard by an impromptu proposal instead.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Marriage Doctor
programme.desc: When Mike finds out his future son-in-law Kyle fears meeting with the church's new minister, Mike tells Kyle to use him and Vanessa as a strong marriage example. But a recent argument ends up sending them to the minister instead.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Horn vs. Baker
programme.desc: Woman discovers incriminating evidence of her husband cheating after she secretly installs a spy application on his mobile device.

programme.desc: Neighbors argue over incomplete repairs to a fence.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Blink, Don't Blink
programme.desc: Synthetic false eyelashes lead to an injury.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Rice vs. Rice

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Chalking It Up/ Unwasted Oil Ride
programme.desc: A student vandalizes a teacher's car; woman sues over stolen used vegetable oil.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Babes With Baguettes
programme.desc: Marquavious meets a girl he met online named Nina. Keke wants to turn a bitter ending into a sweet beginning by getting married on the show but marriage is the furthest thing from Rico's mind.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff dated the defendant for nearly five years and they have a three-year-old daughter together, but claims he was physically abusive and continues to threaten her. She is suing for credit card bills and emotional distress.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Double Crossing' and 'Not Fixing Things Right.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Getting Taken To The Cleaners', 'A Family Fallout' and ' Fowling Up A Party.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Grand Theft Boyfriend/ Bogus Plumber Brother
programme.desc: A woman sues over legal fees. A brother sues his sister over an unauthorized vehicle sale.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lifelong friends dispute over the caring and boarding of horses. Then, the plaintiff claims the defendant caused a three-car accident; the defendants says the plaintiff was already in an accident and is responsible for this collision.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: If You Pass I Will Marry You
programme.desc: Javon says her fiancé Ecotry accuses her of cheating every day, and he says she can't be trusted. Afterwards, Sierra holds off on marrying Frank because she claims that he constantly accuses her of cheating.

programme.title: Maury: You've Missed 25 Years ... Today, I'll Prove I'm Your Son
programme.desc: Stone thinks Reynard is denying him as a son so he doesn't have to pay child support. Reynard's daughter that he's never met is also furious at him for not being a dad. Lucy went through foster care, and is desperate for answers.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Baby Forgive Me
programme.desc: Alexis says her backseat hook-up with Marquis got interrupted by his girlfriend Rylee. Marquis take no shame and blames Rylee for his inability to stay faithful.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: The Psychology of Compatibility
programme.desc: Fanny has been dating for ten years but has been unable to find anyone she's compatible with. Mel might be able to help her out.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Insecure: Lowkey Thankful
programme.desc: Follow the experiences and racy tribulations of a modern day African-American woman.

programme.title: Movie: Get Over It

programme.title: Movie: They Came Together
